title: Name Protect
description: With this mod u can protect your name (essentals needed) u can choose any name you want
body:
🔒 NameProtect – Client-Side Identity Control

Take full control over your in-game identity — without touching the server.

NameProtect is a lightweight client-side mod that allows you to change your Minecraft username locally. Your real name stays untouched on the server, while you can display any name you want on your screen, recordings, or streams.

✨ What does this mod add?

NameProtect introduces a powerful system to spoof your username client-side. This means:

Your real username is still used by the server
Only you see the changed name in-game
Works on any server without server-side installation
⚙️ Features
🔁 Client-Side Name Spoofing
Change your displayed username instantly
💬 Command-Based Control
Manage everything with simple commands:
/nameprotect toggle → Enable or disable NameProtect
/nameprotect change <name> → Set your custom display name
/nameprotect prefix  → Add a prefix to your name
🎥 Content Creator Friendly
Perfect for recordings, streams, and showcases
⚡ Lightweight & Fast
No impact on performance
❓ Why should you download this?
🛡️ Protect your identity while streaming or recording
🎭 Use custom names for roleplay or private gameplay
🚫 No server support needed — works everywhere
🎬 Cleaner footage without exposing your real username
📌 Important Notes
This mod is purely client-side — other players will NOT see your fake name
Does NOT bypass server rules or systems
Safe to use on any server
